executives.name: Michael Fraser
executives.background: Mike Fraser was appointed as CEO and Executive Director of Gold Fields effective 1 January 2024. Prior to joining Gold Fields, he was the CEO of Chaarat Gold Holdings and previously served as Chief Operating Officer at South32.

executives.name: Alex Szabo
executives.background: Alex Szabo was appointed as CFO and Executive Director effective 1 December 2023. He previously served as the Senior Vice President: Group Financial Controller at Gold Fields.

executives.name: Martin Preece
executives.background: Martin Preece served as Interim CEO from January 2023 to December 2023 and is currently the Chief Operating Officer.

board_of_directors.name: Yunus Suleman
board_of_directors.background: Yunus Suleman was appointed to the Board in 2016 and became Chairperson in 2022. He is a Chartered Accountant and former Chairperson of KPMG South Africa.
committees: Capital Projects Control and Review Committee

board_of_directors.name: Cheryl Carolus
board_of_directors.background: Cheryl Carolus has been a member of the Board since 2009. She has held various leadership positions in the public and private sectors in South Africa.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Reid
board_of_directors.background: Steven Reid was appointed to the Board in 2016. He has over 40 years of experience in the international mining industry.
committees: Capital Projects Control and Review Committee

board_of_directors.name: Philisiwe Sibiya
board_of_directors.background: Philisiwe Sibiya was appointed to the Board in 2019. She is the former CEO of MTN Cameroon.

sources.source_description: Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
